rcomplex 0.1.0
  • Reference

Structural survival of cliques across stricter density thresholds

Source: R/cliques.R
clique_threshold_sweep.Rd

Re-runs the full clique detection pipeline at progressively stricter thresholds (multipliers of the original). At each level, networks are re-thresholded, neighborhoods re-compared, q-values recomputed, and cliques re-detected. No permutations are involved – all tests are analytical (hypergeometric + Storey q-values).

clique_threshold_sweep(
  cliques,
  target_species,
  networks,
  orthologs,
  species_pairs = NULL,
  multipliers = c(1.5, 2, 3, 5, 10),
  alternative = c("greater", "less"),
  alpha = 0.05,
  min_species = length(target_species),
  max_genes_per_sp = 10L,
  max_missing_edges = 0L,
  edge_type = "conserved",
  jaccard_threshold = 0.5,
  n_cores = 1L
)

Arguments

cliques

Baseline output of find_cliques.

target_species

Character vector of species abbreviations.

networks

Named list of compute_network outputs, keyed by species abbreviation. Each element must have $network (named numeric matrix) and $threshold (scalar).

orthologs

Data frame with columns Species1, Species2, hog (output of parse_orthologs or extract_orthologs).

species_pairs

Optional list of length-2 character vectors specifying which species pairs to compare. Defaults to all combn(target_species, 2).

multipliers

Numeric vector of threshold multipliers (each > 1). Default c(1.5, 2, 3, 5, 10).

alternative

Passed to summarize_comparison and comparison_to_edges: "greater" (default) or "less".

alpha

Significance threshold for edge classification (default 0.05).

min_species

Minimum species per clique (default length(target_species)).

max_genes_per_sp

Maximum genes per species per HOG (default 10).

max_missing_edges

Passed to find_cliques (default 0).

edge_type

Edge type filter (default "conserved").

jaccard_threshold

Minimum per-species-slot Jaccard similarity for a clique to count as "survived" (default 0.5).

n_cores

Cores for compare_neighborhoods (default 1).

Value

A list with components:

survival

Data frame with one row per (baseline clique, multiplier): clique_idx (0-based), hog, multiplier, survived (logical), jaccard, n_species_orig, n_species_new.

sweep_cliques

Named list of find_cliques() outputs keyed by multiplier.

sweep_edges

Named list of combined edge data frames keyed by multiplier.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
sweep <- clique_threshold_sweep(cliques, target_species, networks,
                                 orthologs, multipliers = c(1.5, 2, 5))
# Survival curve
sapply(sort(unique(sweep$survival$multiplier)),
       function(m) mean(sweep$survival$survived[sweep$survival$multiplier == m]))
} # }

Contents
